name: misfire
description: misfire — a local, deterministic, zero-LLM auditor that ranks which of your existing CLAUDE.md rules your agents actually ignore and converts only those into hooks.

plugins.name: misfire
plugins.description: Trace-grounded CLAUDE.md adherence: rank the prose rules your agents demonstrably ignore from your run history, then scaffold a deterministic hook for the violated convertible subset. Observer-only; keeps safety rules as prose; never writes settings.json.
